name: Cockpit
tagline: Cockpit is a headless content platform that is lightweight, fast and ready for takeoff.
description:
Cockpit is a headless content platform that is lightweight, fast and ready for takeoff.

Docs: https://getcockpit.com/documentation/?utm_source=coolify.io

_Template derived from coollabsio/coolify (coolify@e7dff30, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  cockpit:
    image: cockpithq/cockpit:core-latest
    volumes:
      - cockpit-config:/var/www/html/config
      - cockpit-spaces:/var/www/html/.spaces
      - cockpit-storage:/var/www/html/storage
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD
        - wget
        - -q
        - --spider
        - http://127.0.0.1/api/system/healthcheck
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 20s
      retries: 10
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - 42016:80
volumes:
  cockpit-config: null
  cockpit-spaces: null
  cockpit-storage: null
